cajaSugerenciasSubtitulo: Send us your feedback or report errors
sobreNosotrosMisionTexto: ImaginAC is an educational platform designed to facilitate cognitive accessibility for special education teachers and students with specific learning needs.
sobreNosotrosPictoTexto: The pictograms used in ImaginAC come from the ARASAAC project, distributed under Creative Commons license.
atribucionArasaacTexto: The pictographic symbols used are property of the Government of Aragon and were created by Sergio Palao for ARASAAC (http://www.arasaac.org), distributed under Creative Commons BY-NC-SA license.
deslindeAragon: The Government of Aragon is not responsible for the use third parties make of these materials.
sobreHistoriaSubtitulo: From a real need to a tool for everyone
sobreHistoriaParrafo1: ImaginAC wasn't born in an office, but over a coffee afternoon. I listened to a good friend, a future specialized teacher in Therapeutic Pedagogy (PT), share her frustration: despite having excellent pictogram banks, she spent time searching, cutting and pasting manually to create materials tailored to her students.
sobreHistoriaParrafo2: There was no place that allowed her to create a story from scratch and transform it, instantly, into a ready-to-print visual resource. As a developer, I knew technology had to fill that void.
sobreHistoriaParrafo3: If my friend felt this way, thousands of teachers would be going through the same thing. My mission today is simple: you provide the imagination and I provide the code. Together, we create inclusive and professional materials in seconds.
sobrePerfilDescripcion: My full name is Carmen Vicente Crespo. After finishing my training as a Telecommunications Technology Engineer, I decided to focus my passion on web development, artificial intelligence and cybersecurity.
sobrePerfilDescripcion2: ImaginAC is the result of combining these technical skills with a social purpose: facilitating the daily life of the educational community through intelligent tools.
sobreContactoDescripcion: If you have any doubts or want to propose something, click the button to write to me.
terminosAceptacionTexto: By accessing and using the ImaginAC platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use.
terminosDescripcionTexto: ImaginAC is an educational platform providing cognitive accessibility tools including story generation and adapted activities.
terminosPropiedadTexto: Stories and materials generated may be used for educational purposes. Pictograms are from ARASAAC under CC BY-NC-SA license.
terminosLimitacionTexto: ImaginAC is provided "as is". We are not responsible for damages from using the platform.

terminosContactoTexto: For questions about these terms, contact us through the platform.

formPlaceholderFinalidad: This story helps the child identify and express fear, promoting understanding that it is normal to feel afraid.

cookiesPage1Texto: Cookies are small files stored in the browser so the server can remember information about the user's visit. In addition to traditional cookies, this Website uses localStorage, a local browser storage mechanism that works similarly but is not sent to the server with each request. In both cases, the stored information does not reveal your identity or access your device's content, and is used exclusively to save your preferences and ensure the website works correctly.
cookiesPageFila1Proposito: Saves your preferences about which cookies you accept. Stored in localStorage.
cookiesPageFila2Proposito: Remembers the selected language for the interface. Stored in localStorage.
cookiesPage3P1: If you do not want cookies to be stored in your browser or prefer to be notified each time a cookie requests installation, you can configure your browsing options accordingly. Most browsers allow cookie management in 3 different ways:
cookiesPage3Li2: The browser asks whether the user wants to install each cookie.
cookiesPage3P2: Your browser may also include the option to select in detail which cookies you want installed on your computer. Specifically, the user can usually choose from the following options:
cookiesPage3Li6: Accept cookies as non-persistent (deleted when the browser closes).
cookiesPage3Li7: Allow the server to create cookies for a different domain.
cookiesPageNavTitle: You can find information on how to configure the most common browsers at the following links:
cookiesPageNota: This Website does not use third-party cookies for analytics or advertising purposes. All storage is proprietary and occurs exclusively in the user's browser via localStorage.
cookiesPage4Titulo: Want to change your settings now?
cookiesPage4Texto: You can modify your cookie preferences at any time from our settings panel. There is no need to clear your browser history.
